historical_facts.claim: The AMM pool discrepancy fix required an amendment and validator vote.
historical_facts.quote_or_summary: The official status update describes the fix path and the 80% two-week activation requirement.

historical_facts.claim: XRPL bug fixes that change transaction processing require amendments.
historical_facts.quote_or_summary: The amendment docs state that transaction-process bug fixes require amendments.

historical_outcome.outcome_summary: Fix-oriented amendment route after the AMM launch incident.

safe_route_label.label: PROCEED
safe_route_label.notes: A narrow fix amendment after a known AMM issue is the expected proceed route once reviewed.

short_description: Follow-up AMM bug-fix surface after launch.

sources.summary: XRPL validators vote on amendments; more than 80% support must hold for two weeks, and servers without enabled amendment code become amendment-blocked.
After AMM activation on 2024-03-22, the XRPL community identified AMM pool discrepancies; the post advised users to redeem LP tokens and avoid new deposits until a fix amendment activated.

technical_change: AMM/DEX payment path correction after pool discrepancy reports.
